title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 15. ELECTRIC VEHICLE CHARGING

EQUIPMENT NETWORKS

§1621. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Electric Vehicle Charging Equipment Network Act".

            Acts 2022, No. 762, §1, eff. June 18, 2022.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 15. ELECTRIC VEHICLE CHARGING
EQUIPMENT NETWORKS
§1621.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Electric Vehicle Charging
Equipment Network Act".
Acts 2022, No. 762, §1, eff. June 18, 2022.
